title: Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites: What It Actually Is and How It Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: Many creators in Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya face the challenge of receiving payments for their digital products due to PayPal's hold periods, Gumroad's payout delays, and limited access to traditional payment methods. These restrictions can leave creators with cash flow issues, delaying the sale of their ebooks, courses, and other digital goods. But what if there was a way to integrate cryptocurrency payments into your static site, bypassing these limitations and allowing you to get paid instantly? With the right tools, you can create a seamless payment experience for your buyers and increase your sales. In this post, we'll break down how to integrate crypto payments into your static site, step by step.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment integration for static sites is a technology that enables creators to accept cryptocurrency payments directly on their websites, eliminating the need for third-party payment processors and their associated fees. This technology uses a combination of frontend and backend components to process payments, verify transactions, and deliver products to buyers. For creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya, this technology offers a lifeline, allowing them to monetize their digital products and connect with a global audience.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology works by integrating a frontend wallet connector, such as Web3 Wallet Connect, into your static site. This connector generates a multi-chain QR code that buyers can use to make payments in their preferred cryptocurrency, such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT. The payment data is then sent to a backend engine, which verifies the transaction and delivers the product to the buyer. This process happens in real-time, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of payment delays or failures.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators who want to sell their products globally, without the constraints of traditional payment methods. Whether you're an author, artist, or developer, this technology provides a flexible and secure way to accept cryptocurrency payments, enabling you to reach a broader audience and increase your sales. By using this technology, you can tap into the growing demand for digital products and services, and monetize your expertise and creativity.
By integrating crypto payments into your static site, you can accept payments from buyers in restricted countries and increase your global reach.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make this technology work include the frontend wallet connector, which generates the QR code, and the backend engine, which verifies the transaction and delivers the product. Additionally, a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, is used to facilitate the payment process. This combination of components enables a seamless payment experience for buyers and creators alike, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of payment delays or failures.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To integrate crypto payments into your static site, you'll need to take the following steps: (1) choose a frontend wallet connector, such as Web3 Wallet Connect, and integrate it into your site; (2) set up a backend engine, such as Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, to verify transactions and deliver products; (3) configure a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, to facilitate the payment process; and (4) test your integration to ensure that it works correctly. By following these steps, you can create a seamless payment experience for your buyers and increase your sales.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

To receive crypto payments for your digital products, you can use a frontend wallet connector like Web3 Wallet Connect, which generates a multi-chain QR code that buyers can use to make payments. This connector integrates with a backend engine, which verifies the transaction and delivers the product to the buyer. This process happens in real-time, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of payment delays or failures.
Using a frontend wallet connector like Web3 Wallet Connect eliminates the need for third-party payment processors and their associated fees.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to receive USDT payments for your ebook sales or convert Bitcoin to local currency in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you can use web3 payment solutions like Web3 Wallet Connect. This technology also integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ coins, including USDT. To learn more about integrating web3 payments into your static site, check out Unchained Commerce's GitHub page, https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, for a setup guide and more information.
Your Action Checklist

To integrate crypto payments into your static site and start selling your digital products, take the following steps: (1) set up a frontend wallet connector, such as Web3 Wallet Connect, to generate a multi-chain QR code; (2) configure a backend engine, such as Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, to verify transactions and deliver products; (3) set up a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, to facilitate the payment process; and (4) test your integration to ensure that it works correctly before launching your site. With these steps, you can create a seamless payment experience for your buyers and increase your sales.
With NOWPayments, you can support 300+ coins, including USDT, and facilitate fast and secure payments for your buyers.
